coupon.source_phrase_block: Advance reservations for daytime admission is not required. Bring the pass to the admissions gate to purchase your discounted tickets. This pass admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. This is a coupon pass and doesn't need to be returned to the Library. You may pick up this pass from the Library up to 1 week in advance. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: Franklin Park Zoo: Adults: $22.95
